input_name: Iyemon / Oi Ocha Bottled Green Tea
english_name: Oi Ocha Unsweetened Green Tea PET 600ml
japanese_name: お～いお茶 緑茶 PET 600ml
description: Oi Ocha bottled green tea. Unsweetened, zero-calorie, vending-machine reliable; the default bottle when water feels too boring.
notes: [AMBIGUOUS: Iyemon Green Tea, Oi Ocha Green Tea]

japanese_name: JR東日本 スタンプラリー
description: JR Eki Stamp Rally. Free station-stamp scavenger hunt; grab the card, ride the route, collect tiny ink trophies like a train nerd with purpose.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: JR East Pokemon Stamp Rally, Detective Conan Stamp Rally, Legend Train Stamp Rally, seasonal station stamp events]

japanese_name: JR 駅スタンプ
description: JR Eki stamps. Rubber stamps tucked near ticket gates and station offices; bring a notebook and accept your new tiny obsession.

japanese_name: じゃがポックル
description: Jaga Pokkuru. Hokkaido potato sticks with Okhotsk salt; airport snack logic says buy one box, regret not buying three.

english_name: Pigeon Oshiri Nap Travel Baby Wipes 30 Sheets 2-Pack
japanese_name: ピジョン おしりナップ やわらか厚手仕上げ 純水99％ おでかけ30枚 2個パック
description: Pigeon travel baby wipes. Small enough for a day bag, useful for kids, sticky hands, and the public-bench incident nobody planned for.

japanese_name: ハウス バーモントカレー
description: House Vermont Curry roux blocks. Apple-honey Japanese curry cubes; the fastest route from tired hotel kitchen to actual dinner.

japanese_name: ちょこっとプッチンプリン カスタード
description: Glico Pucchin Pudding. Tiny custard pudding cups that pop out cleanly; konbini dessert engineering, somehow.

english_name: LuLuLun Precious Green Sheet Mask Multipack
japanese_name: ルルルンプレシャス GREEN
description: LuLuLun sheet mask multipacks. Big resealable packs for hotel-night skincare; cheaper than panic-buying single masks one by one.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: LuLuLun Precious Green, LuLuLun Hydrating Daily Mask, Quality 1st Derma Laser, Keana Nadeshiko Rice Mask]

japanese_name: 巾着 弁当袋
description: Kinchaku bento bag. Drawstring lunch pouch, cute enough to make your convenience-store haul look like it has a homeroom teacher.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: kinchaku bento bag, drawstring lunch pouch, insulated lunch tote, character bento bag]

japanese_name: ユニ・チャーム 超快適マスク
description: Unicharm Cho-Kaiteki masks. Soft ear loops, clean drugstore fit; the mask locals grab when cheap scratchy ones start bullying their face.
notes: Image shows brand mask lineup, not a single SKU pack

english_name: Jonetsu Kakaku Blue Tongue Potato Chips
japanese_name: 情熱価格 舌が青くなるポテトチップス
description: Jonetsu Kakaku blue-tongue potato chips. Donki turns a salt chip into a party trick; eat them when you want snacks and evidence.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: blue-tongue potato chips, sweet potato chips, pecan nut chocolate, mango gummies]

japanese_name: ケイト デザイニングアイブロウ3D
description: KATE Designing Eyebrow 3D. Three-pan brow powder that also fakes a nose shadow; drugstore makeup people quietly know.
notes: Image shows the official eyebrow product lineup, not only one shade

japanese_name: 貝印 関孫六 10000CL ペティナイフ
description: Kai Seki Magoroku 10000CL petty knife. Clean Japanese utility knife with a white handle; small enough for fruit, sharp enough to embarrass your Airbnb knife.

japanese_name: 桐灰カイロ
description: Kairo hand warmers. Air-activated heat packs for coat pockets; Japan's winter asks questions and these answer.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: Kiribai Kairo, Hakkin Kairo, stick-on kairo, pocket kairo]

japanese_name: 常盤堂 雷おこし
description: Kaminari okoshi. Asakusa's crunchy rice candy; the souvenir your teeth hear before your brain catches up.
notes: No reliable direct image source found

japanese_name: 箔一 金沢金箔
description: Kanazawa kinpaku items. Edible gold, cosmetics, tiny shiny souvenirs; Kanazawa puts luxury on soft serve like it is normal.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: edible gold leaf, gold leaf cosmetics, gold leaf crafts, gold leaf soft serve]

japanese_name: 花王 バブ
description: Kao Bub bath tablets. Fizzy bath tabs for turning a business-hotel tub into a tiny onsen coping mechanism.
notes: No reliable direct image source found

input_name: Kao Merit Day+ dry shampoo sheets
japanese_name: メリットデイプラス ドライシャンプーシート
description: Merit Day+ dry shampoo sheets. Wipe your scalp and bangs after sweat or trains; emergency hair reset in a flat packet.

japanese_name: かまた刃研社 名入れ包丁
description: Kappabashi engraved kitchen knife. Buy the blade, get your name carved on it; the souvenir that politely threatens your luggage allowance.
notes: [VENUE_CATEGORY: Kappabashi; Kamata Hakensha, Kama-Asa, Tsubaya, Seisuke Knife]

japanese_name: ローソン からあげクン
description: Karaage-kun. Five-piece Lawson fried chicken box; hot case bird nugget royalty with regular, red, cheese, and whatever chaos is seasonal.
notes: No reliable direct image source found

japanese_name: ローソン 厚切りロースカツサンド
description: Katsu sando. Pork cutlet, soft bread, sauce. The konbini sandwich that looks simple until it starts making decisions for you.

japanese_name: ローソン 厚切りロースカツサンド
description: Katsu sandwich. Same basic pork-cutlet-and-soft-bread idea; Lawson's in-store kitchen version goes harder at lunch.

japanese_name: 茅乃舎だし
description: Kayanoya dashi packets. Drop one bag in water and suddenly dinner speaks Japanese; locals gift these because they actually get used.
notes: No reliable direct image source found

japanese_name: 毛穴撫子 お米のマスク
description: Keana Nadeshiko Rice Mask. Ten-sheet rice mask pack, cheap and famous; drugstore tourists buy it like their pores filed a complaint.

japanese_name: 廣榮堂 元祖きびだんご
description: Kibi dango. Okayama's soft millet dumpling souvenir; Momotaro branding does most of the emotional labor.
